name: python3-webargs
title: python3-webargs
summary: Python library for parsing and validating HTTP request arguments (Python 3)
description:
Python library for parsing and validating HTTP request arguments (Python 3)
This package contains a Python library for parsing and validating HTTP request
arguments, with built-in support for popular web frameworks, including Flask,
Django, Bottle, Tornado, Pyramid, webapp2, Falcon, and aiohttp.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-webargs because Python library for parsing and validating HTTP request arguments (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-webargs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-webargs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-webargs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
